name: Cortex Memory
description: Long-term memory powered by Cortex — Auto-Recall, Auto-Capture, agent memory tools, and deduplication

apiKey.description: Cortex API key. Required for the plugin to function. Can also be set via the CORTEX_API_KEY environment variable.

clawDeployBaseUrl.description: Optional ClawDeploy base URL for best-effort TooToo bridge trace emission. Can also be set via CLAWDEPLOY_BASE_URL.

enableClawDeployBridgeTrace.description: Enable best-effort TooToo bridge trace emission to ClawDeploy when CLAWDEPLOY_BASE_URL and OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN are available.

userId.description: User ID to scope memories to this installation. Auto-generated and persisted at ~/.openclaw/cortex-user-id if not set.

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories on cold start when workspace daily notes are unavailable

autoCapture.description: Extract facts from conversations after agent turns

recallLimit.description: Maximum number of memories to retrieve per turn

recallTopK.description: Max memories returned after scoring (applied after recallLimit)

recallQueryType.description: Recall query type to use for automatic recall (factual, emotional, combined, or codex)

recallProfile.description: Recall profile for automatic recall (auto, default, factual, planning, incident, or handoff)

recallTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for memory recall (ms)

toolTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for explicit tool calls and /memories search (ms)

captureMaxPayloadBytes.description: Max byte size of capture payloads. Oversized transcripts are trimmed from oldest messages.

captureFilter.description: Enable built-in filter to drop low-signal content (heartbeat messages, TUI artifacts, token counters) before ingestion

dedupeWindowMinutes.description: Time window (in minutes) for client-side deduplication of explicit memory saves. Set to 0 to disable.

noveltyThreshold.description: Similarity score threshold (0-1) for the novelty check against existing memories. Memories scoring above this are considered duplicates. Lower values are stricter.

auditLog.description: Record all data sent to Cortex in a local audit log at .cortex/audit/

namespace.description: Session namespace to isolate memory per workspace/project. Auto-derived from workspace directory if not set.

captureInstructions.description: Optional custom guidance appended to AGENTS.md describing what kinds of information should be proactively saved to Cortex.

captureCategories.description: Optional list of categories the agent should pay extra attention to when deciding what to save to memory.

sessionGoal.description: Enable session goal detection and injection into recall and capture pipelines

agentRole.description: Agent specialization that tunes capture categories, capture instructions, and recall context for the role.

configVersion.description: Internal config migration version marker. Do not set manually.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.helpText: Your Cortex API key. Can also be provided via the CORTEX_API_KEY environment variable.

clawDeployBaseUrl.label: ClawDeploy Base URL
clawDeployBaseUrl.helpText: Optional ClawDeploy API base URL for TooToo bridge trace observability. Can also be provided via CLAWDEPLOY_BASE_URL.

enableClawDeployBridgeTrace.label: ClawDeploy Bridge Trace
enableClawDeployBridgeTrace.helpText: Best-effort trace emission for TooToo bridge Q&A when ClawDeploy URL and gateway token are available.

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.helpText: Automatically inject relevant memories on cold start when workspace daily notes are unavailable.

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.helpText: Automatically extract facts from conversations after agent turns.

userId.label: User ID
userId.helpText: Scopes all memories to this installation. Auto-generated at ~/.openclaw/cortex-user-id on first run — only set this if you need to share memories across machines or override the auto-generated ID.

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.helpText: Maximum number of memories injected per turn (1-50).

recallQueryType.label: Recall Query Type
recallQueryType.helpText: Query type for automatic recall: factual, emotional, combined, or codex.

recallTopK.label: Recall Top-K
recallTopK.helpText: Max memories returned after scoring, applied after recallLimit (1-50).

recallProfile.label: Recall Profile
recallProfile.helpText: Recall strategy profile. 'auto' selects the best profile based on conversation context.

toolTimeoutMs.label: Tool Timeout (ms)
toolTimeoutMs.helpText: Timeout for cortex_search_memory tool and /memories command searches.

captureMaxPayloadBytes.label: Capture Max Payload Size
captureMaxPayloadBytes.helpText: Maximum byte size for capture payloads (default 256KB). Oversized transcripts are trimmed from oldest messages.

captureFilter.label: Capture Filter
captureFilter.helpText: Filters out low-signal content (heartbeats, TUI artifacts, token counters) before ingestion.

dedupeWindowMinutes.label: Dedupe Window (min)
dedupeWindowMinutes.helpText: Time window for client-side deduplication of saves. Saves that are too similar to a recent save within this window are skipped. Set to 0 to disable.

noveltyThreshold.label: Novelty Threshold
noveltyThreshold.helpText: Similarity score (0-1) above which an existing memory is considered a duplicate during save-if-novel checks. Lower = stricter deduplication.

auditLog.label: Audit Log
auditLog.helpText: Records every payload sent to Cortex at .cortex/audit/ in your workspace. Also toggleable at runtime via /audit on.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.helpText: Isolates memory per workspace. Auto-derived from workspace directory if left empty.

captureInstructions.label: Capture Instructions
captureInstructions.helpText: Appends custom save guidance to the injected Cortex section in AGENTS.md so the agent knows what to prioritize.

captureCategories.label: Capture Categories
captureCategories.helpText: Highlights categories the agent should especially watch for when deciding what to save to memory.

sessionGoal.label: Session Goal
sessionGoal.helpText: When enabled, the agent sets a session goal that biases recall toward relevant memories and tags captured facts.

agentRole.label: Agent Role
agentRole.helpText: Tunes memory capture and recall for a specific focus area. Leave unset for general-purpose behavior.

configVersion.label: Config Version
configVersion.helpText: Internal migration marker. Do not change manually.
